title: Portfolio dashboard loads and shows job summary stats
description: Verifies the portfolio dashboard renders and displays the four top-level job stats values.

title: Portfolio dashboard shows next review target with source and job ID
description: Verifies the dashboard displays the next review target section including source and job ID labels/values.

steps.description: Verify text "Next review target" is visible
Verify element "Open job workspace" is visible

title: Open job workspace from next review target navigates into job workspace (dynamic URL)
description: Verifies clicking the Open job workspace link transitions into the job workspace experience.

steps.description: Verify element "Job workspace sidebar" is visible

title: Browse jobs in collapsible tree and expand a source group
description: Verifies the job tree can be expanded from a collapsed source node to reveal child jobs.

steps.description: Click a collapsed source node in the job tree
Verify at least one child job entry is visible under that source
Click the same source node again
Verify the child job entries under that source are no longer visible

title: Selecting a job entry updates the job details area
description: Verifies clicking a job entry in the tree shows job details (card/panel) for that job.

steps.description: Click a job entry in the job tree

title: Job entry with missing artifacts shows an empty or missing state in job details
description: Verifies the UI handles a job without artifacts by showing a missing/empty state rather than breaking.

steps.description: Click a job entry that is labeled or indicated as having no artifacts

title: Navigate from Portfolio to Data Explorer via 'Browse all local job artifacts' link
description: Verifies the dashboard link routes to the Data Explorer page.

title: Developer Tools section expands and exposes sandbox links
description: Verifies the Developer Tools section can be expanded and shows available sandbox/tool links.

steps.description: Verify element "CV Graph Editor" is visible

title: Open a sandbox tool from Developer Tools and land on a sandbox route
description: Verifies a sandbox link from Developer Tools navigates to its corresponding sandbox page.

title: Open Data Explorer and view root data/jobs listing
description: Verifies the Data Explorer loads and shows the root directory listing with directory item counts and file size indicators.

steps.description: Verify element "root directory listing" is visible
Verify element "item count for a directory" is visible
Verify element "size indicator for a file" is visible

title: Navigate into a folder and confirm ?path= updates and contents render
description: Verifies clicking a folder navigates into it, updates the query parameter, and shows the folder contents with directory item counts.

steps.description: Click on the first visible folder in the listing
Verify element "folder contents listing" is visible
Verify element "item count for a directory" is visible

title: Open a JSON file and view pretty-printed JSON preview
description: Verifies selecting a JSON file shows an inline, readable pretty-printed JSON preview.

steps.description: Click on the first visible folder in the listing
Click on a visible JSON file in the folder contents
Verify element "file preview panel" is visible
Verify element "pretty-printed JSON preview" is visible

title: Use breadcrumb navigation to go back up one directory level
description: Verifies breadcrumb navigation works to move up the directory tree and updates the listing accordingly.

steps.description: Click on the first visible folder in the listing
Click on the breadcrumb item for the parent directory
Verify element "root directory listing" is visible

title: Preview a markdown/text file as plain text
description: Verifies selecting a markdown/text file shows an inline plain-text preview.

steps.description: Click on a visible text or markdown file in the listing
Verify element "file preview panel" is visible
Verify element "plain text preview" is visible

title: Preview an image file inline (PNG/JPG/GIF/SVG)
description: Verifies selecting an image file renders the image inline in the preview area.

steps.description: Click on a visible image file (PNG/JPG/GIF/SVG) in the listing
Verify element "file preview panel" is visible
Verify element "size indicator for the selected file" is visible

title: Attempt to preview a very large or unsupported file and see a cannot-preview message
description: Verifies large or unsupported files show a size indicator and a clear preview failure/cannot-preview message instead of crashing.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the directory listing
Click on a visible file that appears very large (based on the size indicator) or has an unsupported type
Verify element "size indicator for the selected file" is visible
Verify element "file preview panel" is visible

title: Directory item count visibility after navigating across multiple folders
description: Verifies directory item counts remain visible and update correctly after navigating into a folder and then into a subfolder.

steps.description: Verify element "item count for a directory" is visible
Click on the first visible folder in the listing
Verify element "item count for a directory" is visible
Click on a visible subfolder in the folder contents
Verify element "item count for a directory" is visible

title: Graph Explorer displays when entering a job workspace (View 1 selected)
description: Verifies the job workspace loads and the Graph Explorer (View 1) graph area is visible.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job tree

title: Selecting View 1 shows pipeline nodes and edges in the graph area
description: Verifies switching to View 1 renders a visible node/edge graph area (ReactFlow view).

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job tree

title: Clicking an edge reveals match reasoning below the graph
description: Verifies that selecting an edge in the graph surfaces match reasoning text in the details area.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job tree
Click on a visible connection/edge line between two nodes in the graph

title: Match score information is visible after selecting a match edge
description: Verifies match scoring details become visible after an edge is selected.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job tree
Click on a visible connection/edge line between two nodes in the graph

title: Graph Explorer remains usable after scrolling (details area stays readable)
description: Verifies the match reasoning/details area can be reached and read via scrolling without losing the graph context.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job tree
Click on a visible connection/edge line between two nodes in the graph
Scroll to the section below the graph

title: Sidebar Evidence Bank toggle shows expected limitation (not implemented) without breaking Graph Explorer
description: Verifies interacting with the Evidence Bank item does not break the View 1 Graph Explorer view and reflects the known limitation behavior.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job tree
Click on "Evidence Bank" in the workspace sidebar

title: Sidebar active-state confusion: Evidence Bank and Graph Explorer may both appear active on the same URL
description: Verifies the known limitation where both sidebar items can appear active simultaneously due to shared URL, without blocking use of View 1.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job tree
Click on "Graph Explorer" in the workspace sidebar

title: View 2 tab shows line-level source markdown list
description: Verifies that the Extraction Review (View 2) tab can be opened and displays source markdown as selectable line items.
category: Job Workspace — Document to Graph (Extraction Review, View 2)

steps.description: Scroll to the review queue or job list section
Click on the first visible job item to open the job workspace
Verify element "source markdown" is visible as a list of clickable line items

title: Selecting a source line shows requirement details panel
description: Verifies that clicking a markdown line shows requirement metadata (ID, priority, spans) in the requirement panel.
category: Job Workspace — Document to Graph (Extraction Review, View 2)

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item to open the job workspace
Click on the first clickable line item in the source markdown list
Verify text "ID" is visible in the requirement panel
Verify text "Priority" is visible in the requirement panel
Verify text "Spans" is visible in the requirement panel

title: Selecting a different line updates requirement panel content
description: Verifies that selecting different markdown lines updates the displayed requirement metadata rather than staying stale.
category: Job Workspace — Document to Graph (Extraction Review, View 2)

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item to open the job workspace
Click on the first clickable line item in the source markdown list
Click on a different clickable line item in the source markdown list
Verify text "ID" is visible in the requirement panel
Verify text "Spans" is visible in the requirement panel

title: Requirement selection triggers graph highlight state
description: Verifies that selecting a line in View 2 results in a visible graph highlight for the corresponding requirement node (or an explicit highlight indicator).
category: Job Workspace — Document to Graph (Extraction Review, View 2)

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item to open the job workspace
Click on a clickable line item in the source markdown list
Verify element "graph highlight" is visible for the selected requirement

title: View 2 shows guidance that inline requirement editing is not available
description: Verifies that users cannot edit requirements inline in View 2 and are instructed to use Node Editor (or no edit controls appear).
category: Job Workspace — Document to Graph (Extraction Review, View 2)

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item to open the job workspace
Click on a clickable line item in the source markdown list
Verify text "Node Editor" is visible as guidance for editing or verify that no "Edit" control is visible in the requirement panel

title: Attempting to edit requirement inline does not allow changes
description: Verifies that attempting to change requirement fields inline is blocked (no editable fields or save action).
category: Job Workspace — Document to Graph (Extraction Review, View 2)

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item to open the job workspace
Click on a clickable line item in the source markdown list
Verify that no input fields for requirement "ID" are visible
Verify that no input fields for requirement "Priority" are visible
Verify that no "Save" button is visible in the View 2 requirement panel

title: View 2 remains functional after scrolling through many lines
description: Verifies that line selection continues to work after scrolling the source markdown list.
category: Job Workspace — Document to Graph (Extraction Review, View 2)

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item to open the job workspace
Scroll to the lower portion of the source markdown line list
Click on a clickable line item near the bottom of the list
Verify text "ID" is visible in the requirement panel

title: View 2 displays empty-state messaging when no line is selected
description: Verifies that the requirement panel shows a clear empty state (or prompts the user) before any line is selected.
category: Job Workspace — Document to Graph (Extraction Review, View 2)

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item to open the job workspace
Verify text "Select" is visible in the requirement panel as a prompt or verify text indicating no line is selected is visible

title: Open View 3 and see the generated document preview container
description: Verifies that View 3 can be opened from a job workspace and shows a visible document preview area.

steps.description: Click on a visible job entry or job folder that opens the job workspace
Verify element "Generated document preview" is visible

title: Select a document section in View 3 and verify focus/selection changes
description: Verifies that clicking a document section in View 3 selects it and shows section-level interaction affordances (focus, caret, or selection state).

steps.description: Click on a visible job entry or job folder that opens the job workspace
Verify element "Generated document preview" is visible
Click on a visible document section heading or section block in the preview

title: Attempt to insert evidence snippet for a selected section when insertion options are available
description: Verifies that section-level insertion options can be opened and an evidence snippet can be chosen when the UI presents available evidence.

steps.description: Click on a visible job entry or job folder that opens the job workspace
Click on a visible document section heading or section block in the preview
Verify element "Evidence snippet options" is visible

title: Edit a section using the basic text editing control (no rich diff)
description: Verifies that a section can be placed into an editable state (simple textarea or similar) and accepts typed content.

steps.description: Click on a visible job entry or job folder that opens the job workspace
Click on a visible document section heading or section block in the preview
Type " Test edit" into the section editor textarea

title: Attempt to open section-level version diff and confirm it is not available
description: Verifies that requesting a section-level diff shows an unavailable state (no diff available) rather than a rich diff UI.

steps.description: Click on a visible job entry or job folder that opens the job workspace
Click on a visible document section heading or section block in the preview
Verify text "No diff available" is visible

title: Verify View 3 remains usable when no evidence insertion is available
description: Verifies that selecting a section does not break the page when evidence snippets are unavailable and provides a read-only or basic editing experience.

steps.description: Click on a visible job entry or job folder that opens the job workspace
Click on a visible document section heading or section block in the preview
Verify text "No evidence available" is visible
Verify element "Generated document preview" is visible

title: Switch away from View 3 and return to ensure the preview still renders
description: Verifies that the document preview continues to render after navigating to another view and back within the job workspace.

steps.description: Click on a visible job entry or job folder that opens the job workspace
Verify element "Generated document preview" is visible
Verify element "Generated document preview" is visible

title: Outputs tab - open and edit a Markdown output and save
description: Verifies a user can open a Markdown output in the Outputs tab, edit it, and save changes successfully.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job list to open its workspace
Verify element "Outputs" file list is visible
Click on the markdown file named "cv.md" if it is visible in the list
Verify element "markdown editor" textarea is visible
Type "\n\nTest change from UI automation." into the markdown editor textarea

title: Outputs tab - Markdown save persists when reopening the same file (within session)
description: Verifies that after saving a Markdown output, reopening the file shows the updated content.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job list to open its workspace
Click on the markdown file named "cv.md" if it is visible in the list
Type "\nSaved marker: PIPELINE_OUTPUTS_MD" into the markdown editor textarea
Click on the markdown file named "cv.md" if it is visible in the list

title: Outputs tab - open and view a JSON output file
description: Verifies a user can open a JSON output file and see a raw JSON textarea editor populated with content.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job list to open its workspace
Click on a file in the list with a ".json" extension
Verify element "raw JSON editor" textarea is visible

title: Outputs tab - invalid JSON shows save failure or validation error
description: Verifies saving invalid JSON is rejected or results in a visible error/failure state.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job list to open its workspace
Click on a file in the list with a ".json" extension
Verify element "raw JSON editor" textarea is visible
Type "{ invalid json" into the raw JSON editor textarea

title: Outputs tab - switch between two output files updates the preview/editor
description: Verifies selecting a different output file updates the visible editor/preview accordingly.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job list to open its workspace
Click on a file in the list with a ".md" extension
Verify element "markdown editor" textarea is visible
Click on a different file in the list with a ".json" extension
Verify element "raw JSON editor" textarea is visible

title: Outputs tab - PNG output renders as an image preview
description: Verifies that selecting a PNG output displays a visible image preview.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job list to open its workspace
Click on a file in the list with a ".png" extension
Verify element "Outputs" file list is visible

title: Outputs tab - Save is disabled or no-op when no changes were made
description: Verifies the Save behavior when the user has not modified the opened file (either disabled or results in no visible change).

steps.description: Click on the first visible job item in the review queue or job list to open its workspace
Click on a file in the list with a ".md" extension
Verify element "markdown editor" textarea is visible

title: Open Node Editor from Portfolio and view graph canvas
description: Verifies the Node Editor page can be reached from the portfolio dashboard and displays the ReactFlow graph UI.

steps.description: Click on "Developer Tools" (or similarly labeled section) if it is visible

title: Select a node and confirm sidebar JSON editor focuses on node path
description: Verifies clicking a node updates the sidebar editor to the selected node and shows its JSON path/context.

steps.description: Click on a visible node in the graph canvas

title: Edit a JSON value for a selected node and save successfully
description: Verifies a user can modify a JSON value for a node and trigger a successful save acknowledgement.

steps.description: Click on a visible node in the graph canvas
Type "test_edit_value" into the JSON editor at a visible editable value field

title: Attempt to save with JSON syntax error and verify save is blocked
description: Verifies invalid JSON prevents saving and an error/validation message is shown.

steps.description: Click on a visible node in the graph canvas
Type "{" into the JSON editor to introduce an obvious JSON syntax error

title: Switch selection between two nodes and verify sidebar updates accordingly
description: Verifies node selection changes update the focused node information/path in the sidebar editor.

steps.description: Click on a first visible node in the graph canvas
Click on a different visible node in the graph canvas

title: Save button remains disabled or no-op when nothing has changed
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving when there are no edits to persist (or clearly indicates no changes).

steps.description: Click on a visible node in the graph canvas

title: JSON editor remains visible and usable after a failed save attempt
description: Verifies that after a validation error, the editor stays open and user can correct input without losing context.

steps.description: Click on a visible node in the graph canvas
Type "{" into the JSON editor to introduce an obvious JSON syntax error

title: Deployment Page shows mission status, checklist section, and resume command area
description: Verifies the Deployment Page loads and displays the key sections: mission status, checklist, and resume command/package area.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job entry in the review queue or job list
Click on "Deployment" in the job workspace navigation/sidebar

title: Deployment checklist shows completed-stage indicators (check_circle icons)
description: Verifies the checklist renders and shows completed items with check-circle style indicators.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job entry in the review queue or job list
Click on "Deployment" in the job workspace navigation/sidebar

title: Submit Application button is disabled when checklist is not fully complete
description: Verifies that the Submit Application button appears disabled when the job is not ready for submission.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job entry in the review queue or job list
Click on "Deployment" in the job workspace navigation/sidebar

title: Submit Application click results in no submission (UI-only placeholder) when all items appear complete
description: Verifies that clicking Submit Application does not navigate away or show a success submission result (endpoint missing).

steps.description: Click on the first visible job entry in the review queue or job list
Click on "Deployment" in the job workspace navigation/sidebar

title: Deployment Page shows resume command for continuing the pipeline
description: Verifies the resume command text is present and visible to the user.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job entry in the review queue or job list
Click on "Deployment" in the job workspace navigation/sidebar

title: Deployment Page displays package file listing section
description: Verifies the package files area is present and shows a listing or an empty-state message.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job entry in the review queue or job list
Click on "Deployment" in the job workspace navigation/sidebar

title: Deployment Page remains usable when timeline/package data is slow to load
description: Verifies the page renders stable sections while data loads (no blank screen), and content appears after waiting.

steps.description: Click on the first visible job entry in the review queue or job list
Click on "Deployment" in the job workspace navigation/sidebar

title: Open Sandbox index and verify available developer tools are listed
description: Verifies the sandbox index page loads and shows entries for the available sandbox tools.

title: From Sandbox index, open Text Tagger sandbox
description: Verifies a user can navigate from the sandbox index to the Text Tagger sandbox page via UI click.

title: Text Tagger sandbox basic interaction updates visible state
description: Verifies that interacting with Text Tagger controls results in an immediate visible change on the page.

title: Text Tagger sandbox can be reset after creating tags
description: Verifies the sandbox state can be cleared via Reset after the user performs tagging actions.

title: Open Node Editor sandbox page
description: Verifies the node editor sandbox page loads and presents the expected sandbox UI entry point.

title: Open CV Graph Editor sandbox page from sandbox index
description: Verifies a user can navigate from the sandbox index to the CV graph editor sandbox page.

title: CV Graph Editor sandbox loads canvas/editor surface
description: Verifies the CV graph editor sandbox page renders an editor surface that is visibly present.
